sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ الأَبُ إِلَى مَحَلِّ الخُضَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je otišao u prodavnicu povrća ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The father went to the vegetable shop in the morning.

sentences.translation: Kupio je paradajz, krastavac i šargarepu.
sentences.translationEn: He bought tomatoes, cucumbers, and carrots.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَ الثَّمَنَ وَأَخَذَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ فِي حَقِيبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Platio je cijenu i sve uzeo u vrećici.
sentences.translationEn: He paid the price and took everything in a bag.

sentences.arabic: عَادَ إِلَى البَيْتِ وَأَعْطَى الخُضَارَ لِزَوْجَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Vratio se kući i dao povrće ženi.
sentences.translationEn: He returned home and gave the vegetables to his wife.
